Itinerary.title: 5-Day Toronto Trip
Itinerary.summary: A balanced 5-day plan mixing major attractions, neighborhood exploration, island time, and local dining with relaxed pacing.

Day.note: Easy first day to get oriented and adjust to the city.

Activity.name: Arrival and hotel check-in
Activity.description: Settle into accommodation, drop bags, quick rest.

Activity.name: CN Tower & Harbourfront walk
Activity.description: Visit CN Tower (optional EdgeWalk view) then stroll the waterfront and Queens Quay.

Activity.name: Dinner at a waterfront restaurant
Activity.description: Choose a casual spot with lake views to unwind.

Day.note: Culture-focused day with indoor options in case of rain.

Activity.name: Royal Ontario Museum (ROM)
Activity.description: Explore natural history and world cultures exhibits.

Activity.name: Lunch on Bloor or Yorkville cafe
Activity.description: Light lunch in the upscale Yorkville or nearby cafes.

Activity.name: Distillery District stroll and shops
Activity.description: Historic brick-lined district with galleries, boutiques, and craft beer.

Day.note: A relaxed day with outdoor time and scenic views.

Activity.name: Ferry to Toronto Islands
Activity.description: Short ferry ride to the Islands for walking, biking, or beach time.

Activity.name: Picnic or cafe on the Islands
Activity.description: Bring or buy a casual lunch and relax by the water.

Activity.name: Return and dinner in the Entertainment District
Activity.description: Try a trendy restaurant or gastropub near King St.

Day.note: Explore local markets, murals, and diverse food options.

Activity.name: Kensington Market wander
Activity.description: Vintage shops, street art, and eclectic markets.

Activity.name: Lunch in Chinatown
Activity.description: Savor dumplings, noodles, and bubble tea.

Activity.name: Art gallery or Graffiti Alley photo walk
Activity.description: Visit local galleries or photograph murals in the Fashion District.

Day.note: Wrap up with a market visit and flexible time before departure.

Activity.name: St. Lawrence Market visit
Activity.description: Sample local foods, grab souvenirs, and browse specialty stalls.

Activity.name: Optional afternoon: Hockey Hall of Fame or shopping on Queen
Activity.description: Choose an attraction based on interest and time before heading to airport or station.

Activity.name: Departure
Activity.description: Return to accommodation, collect luggage, and travel to airport or train station.
